thread.title: Kailash Makwana to be new DGP of Madhya Pradesh
thread.title_full: Kailash Makwana to be new DGP of Madhya Pradesh

author: @indianexpress
title: Kailash Makwana to be new DGP of Madhya Pradesh
text:
skip to main content Sections English தமிழ் বাংলা മലയാളം ગુજરાતી हिंदी मराठी Business बिज़नेस Newsletters Edition India International Sunday, Nov 24, 2024 ePaper Today’s Paper Journalism of Courage Home ePaper My Express UPSC World India Explained Opinion Politics Entertainment Business Sports Cities Lifestyle Tech Research Videos Subscribe Sign In Trending Mumbai News Delhi News Chandigarh News Bangalore News Pune News Lucknow News Ahmedabad News Chennai News Advertisement News India Kailash Makwana to be new DGP of Madhya Pradesh Kailash Makwana to be new DGP of Madhya Pradesh Makwana is currently chairman of the MP Police Housing Corporation. He will take over as the new DGP of the state on December 1. By: PTI Bhopal | November 24, 2024 11:27 IST 1 min read An order issued late Saturday night stated Kailash Makwana will replace incumbent DGP Sudhir Saxena, who is set to retire on November 30. (@ips_kmak/X)
The Madhya Pradesh government has appointed 1988 batch IPS officer Kailash Makwana as the state’s next director general of police (DGP).
An order issued late Saturday night stated Makwana will replace incumbent DGP Sudhir Saxena, who is set to retire on November 30.
Makwana is currently chairman of the MP Police Housing Corporation. He will take over as the new DGP of the state on December 1.
Saxena, the 1987-batch Indian Police Service (IPS) officer, became the DGP of Madhya Pradesh in March 2022.
